message:
feat: re-adopt orphaned cr-* tmux sessions on server restart (#83)

On startup, the server scans for cr-* tmux sessions not currently
managed and re-attaches to them using tmux attach-session. This
preserves running AI CLI sessions across server restarts.

Sets lastCommand to session name so the client recognizes them as
valid terminals and doesn't auto-launch replacements.

Client restore logic now keeps terminals with tmuxSession set (not
just those with lastCommand), preventing deletion of re-adopted
terminals.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
